title: Distinct rational numbers
description: You are to write a program to compute the number of distinct rational numbers a/b for the given positive integer N where 0 ≤ a ≤ b ≤ N.
input: The first line of the input includes the number of test cases, 1 ≤ t ≤ 10000. Each test case comes in one line containing 2 ≤ N ≤ 10000.
output: For each test case, print the number of distinct rational numbers in one line.
source: ICPC, Regionals, Asia West Continent, Iran, Iran Internet Programming Contest, IIPC 2015
